name: E-2 options schema: profile tuple options surface via resolved_options even when the rule has no options_schema
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-ts-104
' > tree/g/rules.yaml && printf 'rules:
  g-ts-104:
    - error
    - allow_with_comment: false
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-104 --profile p.yaml --tree tree 2>err.txt; grep -q '"allow_with_comment":false' err.txt && echo passthrough 1>&2
